SEARCH
Package notification

Class NotificationOrder

java.lang.Object
notification.Notification
notification.NotificationOrder
All Implemented Interfaces:
NotificationInterface<Order>
public class NotificationOrder extends Notification implements NotificationInterface<Order>
It implements the order notification
Version:
1.2
Author:
Duna P.R.
See Also:
  • Notification
  • NotificationInterface

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NotificationOrder(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new order notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    NotificationOrder(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeMade, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new order notification
    NotificationOrder(LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new order notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    FullNotification(Order o)
    Creates a full notification
    String

    Creates a snippet of the notification (title and time log)

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationOrder

      public NotificationOrder(LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
      Creates a new order notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
      Parameters:
      timeReceived - the time it was received
      read - whether the user has read it or not
      visible - if the notification has been erased by the user (thus no longer visible for them)
      type - the type of notification

    • NotificationOrder

      public NotificationOrder(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
      Creates a new order notification with default timeMade (this moment)
      Parameters:
      title - the tile of the notification
      text - the message in the notification
      timeReceived - the time it was received
      read - whether the user has read it or not
      visible - if the notification has been erased by the user (thus no longer visible for them)
      type - the type of notification

    • NotificationOrder

      public NotificationOrder(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeMade, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
      Creates a new order notification
      Parameters:
      title - the tile of the notification
      text - the message in the notification
      timeMade - the time it was made
      timeReceived - the time it was received
      read - whether the user has read it or not
      visible - if the notification has been erased by the user (thus no longer visible for them)
      type - the type of notification

  • Method Details

    • FullNotification

      public String FullNotification(Order o)
      Description copied from interface: NotificationInterface
      Creates a full notification
      Specified by:
      FullNotification in interface NotificationInterface<Order>
      Parameters:
      o - object the notification is about
      Returns:
      a string with the complete notification

    • SnippetNotification

      public String SnippetNotification(Order o)
      Description copied from interface: NotificationInterface
      Creates a snippet of the notification (title and time log)
      Specified by:
      SnippetNotification in interface NotificationInterface<Order>
      Parameters:
      o - object the notification is about
      Returns:
      string with a snippet of the notification
